# Blueprint
> Modern type-safe full-stack monorepo — Next.js + ElysiaJS + Prisma.

## Core Files
- [apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx]: Root layout (fonts, providers)
- [apps/web/src/app/page.tsx]: Home page
- [apps/web/src/lib/api.ts]: Eden Treaty API client
- [apps/web/src/providers/query-provider.tsx]: TanStack Query provider
- [apps/server/src/index.ts]: ElysiaJS entry, CORS, routes
- [apps/server/src/controllers/auth.controller.ts]: Auth endpoints
- [apps/server/src/services/auth.service.ts]: Auth business logic
- [apps/server/src/repositories/user.repository.ts]: Prisma user queries
- [packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma]: Database schema (User, Account)
- [packages/db/src/index.ts]: Prisma client singleton
- [packages/shared/src/index.ts]: Zod schemas, types, constants
- [docs/api-reference.md]: API documentation
- [docs/architecture.md]: Architecture guide

## Key Concepts
- **End-to-end type safety**: Prisma → ElysiaJS → Eden Treaty → React (zero manual type syncing)
- **Layered backend**: Controller → Service → Repository pattern
- **Custom auth**: JWT in HTTP-only cookies, Argon2id password hashing via Bun.password
- **Monorepo**: Turborepo + Bun workspaces for dependency management
- **Shared validation**: Zod schemas in @blueprint/shared used by both frontend and backend

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query v5
- Backend: ElysiaJS, Bun, @elysiajs/jwt, @elysiajs/cors
- Database: PostgreSQL (Supabase), Prisma 6
- Testing: Playwright
- Build: Turborepo, TypeScript strict mode
